PRELIMINARY RATING OF EF1. UPROOTED NUMEROUS TREES. SNAPPED A FEW HARDWOOD TRUNKS. MINOR DAMAGE...MOSTLY SHINGLES...TO A COUPLE OF HOMES. DESTROYED A COUPLE OF OUTBUILDINGS. ADDITIONAL DETAILS AND REFINEMENT OF STARTING/ENDING TIMES AND LOCATIONS WILL BE PROVIDED ONCE THE SURVEY TEAM GETS BACK TO THE OFFICE.

AN NWS STORM SURVEY TEAM ASSESSED DAMAGE IN THE WAGONER AREA FROM LAST NIGHTS STORMS. AN AUTOMOBILE DEALERSHIP HAD WIND DAMAGE TO THE CEILING AND TRIM OF A BUILDING...PORTIONS OF A FEW PRIVACY FENCES WERE BLOWN DOWN...A FEW TREE LIMBS WERE BLOWN DOWN...AND SOME SHINGLES WERE BLOWN OFF OF THE ROOFS OF SEVERAL HOMES. THIS DAMAGE WAS VERY SPORADIC. ALTHOUGH A BRIEF...WEAK TORNADO COULD NOT TOTALLY BE RULED OUT...THE DAMAGE REVIEWED TODAY WAS NOT STRONGLY SUPPORTIVE OF IT.
POWER POLE DOWNED
SEVERAL WOOD TRUSSES BLOWN OVER ON PARTIALLY COMPLETED GREENWOOD PD STATION. ADDITIONAL DAMAGE TO METAL ROOF BUILDING.
